results.sql:
WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_roles dr ON ci.role_id = dr.role_id
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.role_id
),
collab AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM directors d
  JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  c.film_count
FROM collab c
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = c.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = c.actor_id
ORDER BY c.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_roles dr ON ci.role_id = dr.role_id
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.role_id
),
collab AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM directors d
  JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND d.director_id <> a.actor_id
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  c.film_count
FROM collab c
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = c.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = c.actor_id
ORDER BY c.film_count DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH director_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'
),
actor_roles AS (
  SELECT id AS role_id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')
),
rating_type AS (
  SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'
),
directors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS director_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN director_roles dr ON ci.role_id = dr.role_id
),
actors AS (
  SELECT ci.person_id AS actor_id, ci.movie_id
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN actor_roles ar ON ci.role_id = ar.role_id
),
collab AS (
  SELECT d.director_id, a.actor_id, COUNT(*) AS film_count
  FROM directors d
  JOIN actors a ON d.movie_id = a.movie_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = d.movie_id
  JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type)
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND d.director_id <> a.actor_id
    AND mii.info::numeric >= 5.0
  GROUP BY d.director_id, a.actor_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
)
SELECT
  nd.name AS director_name,
  na.name AS actor_name,
  c.film_count
FROM collab c
JOIN name nd ON nd.id = c.director_id
JOIN name na ON na.id = c.actor_id
ORDER BY c.film_count DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     genre_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     top_dirs AS (
       SELECT id, name FROM name WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi')
     ),
     top_acts AS (
       SELECT id, name FROM name WHERE name IN ('Lam, Suet', 'Yau, Chingmy', 'Endô, Ken''ichi')
     ),
     collab_films AS (
       SELECT td.name AS director_name, ta.name AS actor_name, t.id AS movie_id,
              t.title, t.production_year
       FROM top_dirs td
       JOIN cast_info ci_d ON ci_d.person_id = td.id AND ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id IN (SELECT id FROM top_acts)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
       JOIN top_acts ta ON ta.id = ci_a.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
     )
SELECT
  cf.director_name, cf.actor_name,
  cf.title, cf.production_year,
  string_agg(DISTINCT mi_genre.info, ', ' ORDER BY mi_genre.info) AS genres,
  MAX(mii.info) AS rating
FROM collab_films cf
LEFT JOIN movie_info mi_genre ON mi_genre.movie_id = cf.movie_id
  AND mi_genre.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_type)
LEFT JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = cf.movie_id
  AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type)
GROUP BY cf.director_name, cf.actor_name, cf.title, cf.production_year, cf.movie_id
ORDER BY cf.director_name, cf.actor_name, cf.production_year;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     genre_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'),
     -- Focus on well-known international theatrical pairs with high film counts
     pairs AS (
       SELECT nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name,
              ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id,
              t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id
       JOIN name nd ON nd.id = ci_d.person_id
       JOIN name na ON na.id = ci_a.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id <> ci_a.person_id
         AND nd.name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'Priyadarshan', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     ),
     pair_genres AS (
       SELECT p.director_name, p.actor_name, mi.info AS genre, COUNT(*) AS cnt
       FROM pairs p
       JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = p.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_type)
       GROUP BY p.director_name, p.actor_name, mi.info
     ),
     pair_totals AS (
       SELECT director_name, actor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total_films
       FROM pairs
       GROUP BY director_name, actor_name
       HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) >= 5
     )
SELECT pg.director_name, pg.actor_name, pt.total_films,
       pg.genre, pg.cnt,
       ROUND(pg.cnt * 100.0 / pt.total_films, 0) AS pct_of_films
FROM pair_genres pg
JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = pg.director_name AND pt.actor_name = pg.actor_name
ORDER BY pt.total_films DESC, pg.cnt DESC;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     pairs AS (
       SELECT nd.name AS director_name, na.name AS actor_name,
              t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id
       JOIN name nd ON nd.id = ci_d.person_id
       JOIN name na ON na.id = ci_a.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id <> ci_a.person_id
         AND nd.name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel', 'Priyadarshan')
     ),
     pair_totals AS (
       SELECT director_name, actor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total_films
       FROM pairs GROUP BY director_name, actor_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) >= 5
     ),
     pair_companies AS (
       SELECT p.director_name, p.actor_name, cn.name AS company, COUNT(*) AS cnt
       FROM pairs p
       JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = p.director_name AND pt.actor_name = p.actor_name
       JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = p.movie_id
       JOIN company_name cn ON cn.id = mc.company_id
       JOIN company_type ct ON ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND ct.kind = 'production companies'
       GROUP BY p.director_name, p.actor_name, cn.name
       HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
     )
SELECT pc.director_name, pc.actor_name, pt.total_films,
       pc.company, pc.cnt,
       ROUND(pc.cnt * 100.0 / pt.total_films, 0) AS pct_of_films
FROM pair_companies pc
JOIN pair_totals pt ON pt.director_name = pc.director_name AND pt.actor_name = pc.actor_name
ORDER BY pt.total_films DESC, pc.cnt DESC
LIMIT 40;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     -- One-off pairs: same director, different actors appearing in exactly 1 film together
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id,
              t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type)
         AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
     ),
     pair_counts AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs
       GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     ),
     -- Classify: repeat (>=3 films) vs one-off (=1 film)
     -- For top repeat directors only (Johnnie To, Wong Jing, Miike, de Oliveira)
     top_directors AS (
       SELECT id FROM name WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     )
SELECT
  CASE WHEN pc.film_count >= 3 THEN 'repeat (3+)' ELSE 'one-off (1)' END AS collab_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT (pc.director_id, pc.actor_id)) AS pair_count,
  ROUND(AVG(pc.film_count), 2) AS avg_films_together,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.movie_id) AS total_films
FROM pair_counts pc
JOIN all_pairs ap ON ap.director_id = pc.director_id AND ap.actor_id = pc.actor_id
WHERE pc.director_id IN (SELECT id FROM top_directors)
  AND pc.film_count IN (1) OR pc.film_count >= 3
GROUP BY collab_type
ORDER BY collab_type;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     top_dir_ids AS (
       SELECT id FROM name WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     ),
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id, t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
         AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type) AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id IN (SELECT id FROM top_dir_ids)
     ),
     pair_counts AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     )
SELECT
  CASE WHEN pc.film_count >= 3 THEN 'repeat (3+)' ELSE 'one-off (1)' END AS collab_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT (pc.director_id, pc.actor_id)) AS pair_count,
  ROUND(AVG(pc.film_count), 2) AS avg_films,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.movie_id) AS distinct_films
FROM pair_counts pc
JOIN all_pairs ap ON ap.director_id = pc.director_id AND ap.actor_id = pc.actor_id
WHERE pc.film_count = 1 OR pc.film_count >= 3
GROUP BY collab_type
ORDER BY collab_type;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     top_dir_ids AS (
       SELECT id FROM name WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     ),
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id, t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
         AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type) AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id IN (SELECT id FROM top_dir_ids)
     ),
     pair_counts AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     ),
     film_class AS (
       SELECT ap.movie_id,
              CASE WHEN pc.film_count >= 3 THEN 'repeat' ELSE 'one-off' END AS collab_type
       FROM all_pairs ap
       JOIN pair_counts pc ON pc.director_id = ap.director_id AND pc.actor_id = ap.actor_id
       WHERE pc.film_count = 1 OR pc.film_count >= 3
     ),
     film_totals AS (
       SELECT collab_type, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total FROM film_class GROUP BY collab_type
     )
SELECT fc.collab_type, k.keyword, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) AS film_cnt,
       ft.total AS total_films_of_type,
       ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) * 100.0 / ft.total, 1) AS pct
FROM film_class fc
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = fc.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
JOIN film_totals ft ON ft.collab_type = fc.collab_type
GROUP BY fc.collab_type, k.keyword, ft.total
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) >= 3
ORDER BY fc.collab_type, pct DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     top_dir_ids AS (
       SELECT id FROM name WHERE name IN ('To, Johnnie', 'Wong, Jing', 'Miike, Takashi', 'de Oliveira, Manoel')
     ),
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id, t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
         AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type) AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
         AND ci_d.person_id IN (SELECT id FROM top_dir_ids)
     ),
     pair_counts AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     ),
     film_class AS (
       SELECT ap.movie_id,
              CASE WHEN pc.film_count >= 3 THEN 'repeat' ELSE 'one-off' END AS collab_type
       FROM all_pairs ap
       JOIN pair_counts pc ON pc.director_id = ap.director_id AND pc.actor_id = ap.actor_id
       WHERE pc.film_count = 1 OR pc.film_count >= 3
     ),
     film_totals AS (
       SELECT collab_type, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total FROM film_class GROUP BY collab_type
     )
SELECT fc.collab_type, k.keyword, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) AS film_cnt,
       ft.total AS total_films_of_type,
       ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) * 100.0 / ft.total, 1) AS pct
FROM film_class fc
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = fc.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
JOIN film_totals ft ON ft.collab_type = fc.collab_type
GROUP BY fc.collab_type, k.keyword, ft.total
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fc.movie_id) >= 5
ORDER BY fc.collab_type DESC, pct DESC
LIMIT 60;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     genre_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'),
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id, t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
         AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type) AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
     ),
     pair_films AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     ),
     -- For each pair, get genre of each film, then compute top-genre share
     pair_genre_films AS (
       SELECT pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count,
              mi.info AS genre, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.movie_id) AS genre_film_cnt
       FROM pair_films pf
       JOIN all_pairs ap ON ap.director_id = pf.director_id AND ap.actor_id = pf.actor_id
       JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ap.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_type)
       WHERE pf.film_count = 1 OR pf.film_count >= 3
       GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count, mi.info
     ),
     pair_top_genre AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
              MAX(genre_film_cnt) AS top_genre_cnt,
              ROUND(MAX(genre_film_cnt) * 100.0 / film_count, 1) AS top_genre_pct
       FROM pair_genre_films
       GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, film_count
     )
SELECT
  CASE WHEN film_count >= 3 THEN 'repeat (3+)' ELSE 'one-off (1)' END AS collab_type,
  COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
  ROUND(AVG(film_count), 2) AS avg_films,
  ROUND(AVG(top_genre_pct), 1) AS avg_top_genre_pct,
  ROUND(MIN(top_genre_pct), 1) AS min_top_genre_pct,
  ROUND(MAX(top_genre_pct), 1) AS max_top_genre_pct
FROM pair_top_genre
GROUP BY collab_type
ORDER BY collab_type;

WITH director_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director'),
     actor_role AS (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor', 'actress')),
     rating_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating'),
     genre_type AS (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres'),
     all_pairs AS (
       SELECT ci_d.person_id AS director_id, ci_a.person_id AS actor_id, t.id AS movie_id
       FROM cast_info ci_d
       JOIN cast_info ci_a ON ci_a.movie_id = ci_d.movie_id AND ci_a.person_id <> ci_d.person_id
       JOIN title t ON t.id = ci_d.movie_id AND t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1990 AND 2010
       JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = t.id
         AND mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM rating_type) AND mii.info::numeric >= 6.0
       WHERE ci_d.role_id = (SELECT id FROM director_role)
         AND ci_a.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM actor_role)
     ),
     pair_films AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS film_count
       FROM all_pairs GROUP BY director_id, actor_id
     ),
     pair_genre_films AS (
       SELECT pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count,
              mi.info AS genre, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.movie_id) AS genre_film_cnt
       FROM pair_films pf
       JOIN all_pairs ap ON ap.director_id = pf.director_id AND ap.actor_id = pf.actor_id
       JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = ap.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM genre_type)
       WHERE pf.film_count BETWEEN 2 AND 2 OR pf.film_count >= 3
       GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count, mi.info
     ),
     pair_top_genre AS (
       SELECT director_id, actor_id, film_count,
              MAX(genre_film_cnt) AS top_genre_cnt,
              ROUND(MAX(genre_film_cnt) * 100.0 / film_count, 1) AS top_genre_pct
       FROM pair_genre_films
       GROUP BY director_id, actor_id, film_count
     ),
     -- Also compute same-company share per pair
     pair_company AS (
       SELECT pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count,
              MAX(sub.same_company_cnt) AS max_company_films,
              ROUND(MAX(sub.same_company_cnt) * 100.0 / pf.film_count, 1) AS top_company_pct
       FROM pair_films pf
       JOIN (
         SELECT ap.director_id, ap.actor_id, mc.company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ap.movie_id) AS same_company_cnt
         FROM all_pairs ap
         JOIN movie_companies mc ON mc.movie_id = ap.movie_id
         GROUP BY ap.director_id, ap.actor_id, mc.company_id
       ) sub ON sub.director_id = pf.director_id AND sub.actor_id = pf.actor_id
       WHERE pf.film_count = 2 OR pf.film_count >= 3
       GROUP BY pf.director_id, pf.actor_id, pf.film_count
     )
SELECT
  CASE WHEN ptg.film_count = 2 THEN 'two-film (2)' ELSE 'repeat (3+)' END AS collab_type,
  COUNT(*) AS pair_count,
  ROUND(AVG(ptg.film_count), 2) AS avg_films,
  ROUND(AVG(ptg.top_genre_pct), 1) AS avg_top_genre_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(pc.top_company_pct), 1) AS avg_top_company_pct
FROM pair_top_genre ptg
JOIN pair_company pc ON pc.director_id = ptg.director_id AND pc.actor_id = ptg.actor_id
GROUP BY collab_type
ORDER BY collab_type;
